label: Nominal Fireline Recon Leg
summary: Emergency autonomy executes a stable wildfire reconnaissance leg with healthy standoff, clearance margin, and recovery readiness.

label: Smoke Corridor Compression
summary: Fireline hazard margins and air-ground coordination begin to degrade but remain within recoverable limits.

label: Unrecoverable Fireline Divert
summary: Divert reachability, hazard margin, and mission-app recovery readiness collapse simultaneously, forcing a reject-grade mission assurance event.
